user_query: I want to explore the culinary delights of Italy. Can you suggest some famous Italian dishes and the best restaurants to try them? Additionally, provide me with the contact details and availability of cooking classes where I can learn to make authentic Italian dishes.

TaskList.description: Fetch a list of famous Italian dishes along with their descriptions.
Find the best restaurants in Italy that serve the famous dishes retrieved from the previous step.
Gather contact details and availability of cooking classes in Italy focused on authentic Italian dishes.
Compile and organize the information from steps 1, 2, and 3 to present a comprehensive guide on Italian culinary experiences.
